title: lora_l2.c generate_eui64 clears only hash buffer, not sha_state
description:
lora_l2.c line 119: memset(hash, 0, ...) clears the output hash, but sha_state remains on stack with internal state. TC_SHA256_STATE_STRUCT contains intermediate hash values. For consistency with security comments elsewhere, should clear sha_state too.

Rewrite: Add memset(&sha_state, 0, sizeof(sha_state)) after line 119.
